parameters.command:
BACKUP_DIR="/mnt/usb-drive/proxmox-backups/dump"; LATEST_BACKUP=$(find "$BACKUP_DIR" -type f \( -name '*.vma.zst' -o -name '*.vma.gz' \) -printf '%T@ %p
' 2>/dev/null | sort -nr | head -1 | cut -d' ' -f2-); LATEST_BACKUP_TIME=$(find "$BACKUP_DIR" -type f \( -name '*.vma.zst' -o -name '*.vma.gz' \) -printf '%TY-%Tm-%Td %TH:%TM %p
' 2>/dev/null | sort -r | head -1); printf "HOST=%s
" "$(hostname)"; printf "DATE=%s
" "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')"; printf "USB_MOUNT=%s
" "$(findmnt -n /mnt/usb-drive >/dev/null && echo 1 || echo 0)"; printf "USB_DISK=%s
" "$(df -h /mnt/usb-drive 2>/dev/null | awk 'NR==2 {print $2,$3,$4,$5}')"; printf "LATEST_BACKUP=%s
" "$LATEST_BACKUP"; printf "LATEST_BACKUP_TIME=%s
" "$LATEST_BACKUP_TIME"; printf "BACKUP_COUNT_24H=%s
" "$(find "$BACKUP_DIR" -type f \( -name '*.vma.zst' -o -name '*.vma.gz' \) -mtime -1 2>/dev/null | wc -l)"; printf "TOTAL_BACKUPS=%s
" "$(find "$BACKUP_DIR" -type f \( -name '*.vma.zst' -o -name '*.vma.gz' \) 2>/dev/null | wc -l)"
